questions.question: What is the main difference between a deterministic and nondeterministic algorithm, and provide an example of each?
questions.hint: Provide a clear explanation and examples

questions.question: Describe Big O notation and how it is used to analyze an algorithm's time complexity. Provide an example of how to calculate Big O notation for a given algorithm.
questions.hint: Use examples and formulas to support your explanation

questions.question: A function has a time complexity of O(n^2) and a space complexity of O(1). Is it suitable for large inputs? Explain your answer.
questions.hint: Explain the implications of the given complexities
